case_title: CHRISTINA KNIGHT et al VS. CHOOSE DIRECT HOT TUBS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:30.00) SERVED NOV-09-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOOSE DIRECT HOT TUBS
PROOF OF SERVICE RE ATTACHMENTS ON (SC-100)PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KNIGHT, CHRISTINA KNIGHT, CHRISTOPHER
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS GRANTED PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT DATED DECEMBER 6, 2010.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KNIGHT, CHRISTINA KNIGHT, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOOSE DIRECT HOT TUBS $6,693.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,693.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-06-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
